code:
---
displayMode: compact
---
gantt
  dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
  title Citadel Magic GANTT diagram
  excludes weekends

  Initial milestone: milestone, m_initial, 2024-09-06, 0d
  V1.0.0-alpha.1: milestone, m1, after validation_cmd, 0d
  V1.0.0-alpha.2: milestone, m2, after generate_cmd dry_mode, 0d
  V1.0.0: milestone, m3, after diff_mode cycle_detection, 0d

  Section Comands
  Validation Command: active, validation_cmd, after manifest_validation, 1d
  Generate Command: active, generate_cmd, after manifest_validation Magic_apply, 1d

  Section Modes
  Dry Mode: active, dry_mode, after Magic_apply, 1d
  Magic Apply: active, Magic_apply, after Magic_render, 2d
  Diff Mode: diff_mode, after overwrite_mode, 3d
  Overwrite Mode: active, overwrite_mode, after clean_mode, 1d
  Clean Mode: active, clean_mode, after Magic_apply, 1d

  Section Rendering
  Magic Render: active, Magic_render, after Cast_render, 1d
  Cast Render: active, Cast_render, after template_source, 1d
  Conditional Render: active, conditional_render, after m1, 2d
  Collection Render: active, collection_render, after m1, 3d
  Conditional Collection Render: active, conditional_collection_render, after collection_render, 2d

  Section Validation
  Manifest process: active, manifest_process, after m_initial, 1d
  Manifest Schema Validation: active, manifest_validation, after manifest_process, 1d
  Cycle Detection: cycle_detection, after Magic_source, 2d

  Section Sources
  Template Source: active, template_source, after m_initial, 1d
  File Source: file_source, after template_source, 1d
  Document Source: document_source, after file_source, 2d
  Magic Source: Magic_source, after Magic_render, 5d
  Cast Selection: Cast_selection, after Magic_source, 2d

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Citadel Magic项目做一个甘特图，时间从9月初开始。整体结构我想分成几个大板块：命令执行、运行模式、渲染流程、验证环节和数据来源。你觉得这个框架合理吗？
框架没问题。我先确认几个关键点：项目起点是9月6日的Initial milestone吗？还有，我注意到有v1、alpha.1、alpha.2这些版本节点，它们和具体任务之间的依赖关系需要明确——比如Validation Command完成后才能触发V1.0.0-alpha.1？

对，Initial milestone是项目启动点。版本节点的依赖关系是：Validation Command完成后到达alpha.1，Generate Command的dry mode完成后到达alpha.2，而最终的V1.0.0要在Cycle Detection通过后才标记完成。另外Generate Command和Validation Command都依赖Manifest Validation的结果。
好的，我把命令部分先画出来。Validation Command和Generate Command都从Manifest Validation之后开始，各需要1天。然后在Modes板块里，Magic Apply是核心环节，需要2天，它后面会分出Clean Mode和Dry Mode两条线，Dry Mode在Magic Apply之后启动。

渲染部分的依赖链要理顺：Template Source是最基础的，然后是Cast Render，再到Magic Render。但这里有个特殊点——Magic Render完成后才能启动Magic Source，而Magic Source要跑5天，之后才能做Cast Selection和Cycle Detection。另外alpha.1之后才能启动Conditional Render和Collection Render。
明白了。Collection Render需要3天，之后是Conditional Collection Render需要2天，对吗？还有Overwrite Mode这条线——Clean Mode完成后启动Overwrite Mode，然后到Diff Mode，Diff Mode要3天，最终Diff Mode完成后才能到达V1.0.0。这个顺序没错吧？
顺序正确。最后补充Sources板块的剩余部分：File Source在Template Source之后1天，Document Source再往后2天。整个图用compact模式显示，排除周末。所有活跃任务都标记active状态。
完成了。我检查一遍关键路径：Manifest process → Manifest Validation → 分支到Validation/Generate Command → alpha.1/alpha.2 → 最终通过Cycle Detection到达V1.0.0。渲染链和模式分支也都对齐了，所有日期格式统一为YYYY-MM-DD。
